items.definition_en: An arch is a curved structure that people can walk under in a garden.
items.example_en: Roses grew over the arch at the garden entrance.

items.definition_en: A bench is a long seat for several people in the garden.
items.example_en: We sat on the bench and watched the birds.

items.definition_en: A bird table is a small table where people leave food for birds.
items.example_en: A sparrow landed on the bird table to eat.

items.definition_en: A conservatory is a glass room attached to a house for growing plants.
items.example_en: We keep many plants in the conservatory.

items.definition_en: A deck is a flat wooden floor outside the house in the garden.
items.example_en: We had breakfast together on the deck.

items.definition_en: A fence is a structure that goes around a garden for protection.
items.example_en: He painted the wooden fence white.

items.definition_en: A fire pit is a place in the garden for safely making a fire.
items.example_en: We sat by the fire pit and roasted marshmallows.

items.definition_en: A fountain is a structure that sends water into the air in a garden.
items.example_en: There is a beautiful fountain in the center of the garden.

items.definition_en: A gate is a door in a fence or wall of a garden.
items.example_en: She opened the gate to let the dog in.

items.definition_en: A gazebo is a small, open building in a garden for sitting.
items.example_en: We had tea in the gazebo on Sunday afternoon.

items.definition_en: A greenhouse is a glass building for growing plants.
items.example_en: Tom grows tomatoes in his greenhouse.

items.definition_en: A hut is a small simple house or building in a garden.
items.example_en: The children played in the garden hut.

items.definition_en: A path is a track in the garden where people can walk.
items.example_en: She walked slowly along the garden path.

items.definition_en: A patio is a paved area outside a house for sitting.
items.example_en: We ate lunch on the patio.

items.definition_en: A pergola is a structure in the garden with open sides and a roof for climbing plants.
items.example_en: Vines grew all over the pergola.

items.definition_en: A pond is a small area of water in a garden.
items.example_en: There are frogs in the garden pond.

items.definition_en: A shed is a small building in a garden where tools are kept.
items.example_en: He keeps his tools in the garden shed.

items.definition_en: A statue is an object shaped like a person or animal in a garden.
items.example_en: There is a stone statue near the flowers.

items.definition_en: A swing is a seat hanging from ropes for sitting and moving in the garden.
items.example_en: The children played on the swing all afternoon.

items.definition_en: A trellis is a structure made of crossed strips to support climbing plants.
items.example_en: The roses grew up the wooden trellis.
